notes:
Call UX & Agent Stability Hotfix

  • Bubbles/Grid polish: Camera-off avatar fallback now works in bubbles, panel spacing is tighter, grid labels are cleaner, and decorative grid strokes were removed.
  • Presence cleanup: Offline users no longer show stale active-app badges.
  • AI agent reliability: Jester session handling is more stable in group calls and agent state listeners now auto-recover after transient permission issues.
